title: Astras Resource Pack
description: A simple vanilla-like 16x resource pack that introduces new textures and a new feel.
body:
A simple vanilla-like 16x resource pack that introduces new textures and a new feel. Includes better designs for weapons and ores, as well as new textures for the GUI. It works with all shaders, so take your pick. Let the adventure begin!

## Includes (in the latest version) - Helmets, Chestplates, Leggings, Boots of Leather, Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite (all Item, Entity) - Swords, Pickaxes, Axes, Shovels, Hoes of Wood, Stone, Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite - Elytras Complete(Item, Entity) and Broken, Helmet of Turtle(Item, Entity) - Saddle(Item) - Arrows, Fireworks, Bows, Crossbows of Arrow and Firework, Fishing Rods - Flints and Steel, Shears, Brushes - Coal(Item), Iron(Raw, Ingot, Nugget), Gold(Raw, Ingot, Nugget), Cooper(Raw, Ingot), Diamond(Item), Emerald(Item), Netherite(Ingot), Redstone(Powder), Amethyst(Shard), Lapis Lazuli(Item), Quartz(Item) - Flint(Item), Blaze(Rod, Powder), Breeze(Rod) - Ender Pearls, Ender Eyes(Item, Block) - Sugar - Golden Apples, Golden Carrots, Glistering Melon - Buckets of Water, Lava, Milk, Snow, all Fish - Enchanted Glint, Books - Spyglass(Item, Vision) - Spawner, Trial Spawners, Trial Keys, Vaults - Snowball, Clayball, Slime, Magma Cream, Fire Charge - Bone, Bone Meal - And More ## Install You can use this resource pack as an overlay over other resource packs for textures that have not been changed. Download the ZIP file from one of the versions (the latest version recommended), go to the .minecraft folder, paste the ZIP file in the resource pack folder, and, in Minecraft, put the Astras Resource Pack over a resource pack that has everything else, like the default Minecraft Pack.

## About
Terms of Use

Please read attentively and carefully.

  • You can alter the contents of this pack as long as you do not publish it or give it to another person.
  • Do not reupload Astras Resource Pack, or any of its components, on any other platform, even if it is not altered.
  • You can use this pack, altered personally or not, in your videos as long as there is a link to this page or the name of this pack is given in the description of said video.
  • Do not post clearly altered components of this pack publicly, for money, unless given authorization from the creator.
  • Copyright Terms for websites on which this pack is uploaded also apply to it.
This is a personal project, so not all textures have been changed, but expect more to come out over time. If you like this resource pack, please consider tipping $1 [here](https://ko-fi.com/zer0less9). Please enjoy the textures. Do not download this pack from any websites other than Modrinth and Curseforge; they can contain malware and are not official products. May contain pixels! With care from zer0less9 🌌
